## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance, lead generation, and LLM prompt tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant increase in leads (17) in first 5 days of August; overall site had best month ever in clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Blog content performing well with 9.8% increase in clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve Firework's presence for "livestream commerce" related prompts in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Plan to create content clarifying Firework's capabilities vs. traditional livestreaming](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)

## Topics

### Lead Generation Performance

  - [Healthy trend of increasing leads since March, with 17 leads in first 5 days of August](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Attributed to blog page optimizations, CTAs, and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Action: Deep dive into which blog posts are driving recent leads](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Overall site: Best month ever in clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Blog: 9.8% increase in clicks week-over-week, stable impressions](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Top performing pages consistently include TikTok, Instagram, and vertical video topics](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Average position slightly improved from 18 to 17](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Action: Analyze top-performing pages for conversion rates and optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### LLM Prompt Tracking

  - [Updated prompts to focus on 24/7 livestream shopping and shoppable video](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Firework shows strong presence for shoppable video prompts](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Gap identified in "livestream commerce trends" category](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Action: Export list of prompts where competitors outperform Firework](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Include more posts specific to livestreaming and shoppable video](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Create comparison/alternatives content targeting refined list of competitors](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Develop content addressing brand-retailer interaction/syndication keywords](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Plan article on redefining online engagement beyond traditional livestreaming](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Megan to export and analyze LLM prompt data where competitors outperform Firework](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Ritesh/Sam to send product slides highlighting Firework's unique features vs. livestreaming](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [GrowthX team to develop new content on clarifying livestream capabilities and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance as recent backend changes settle](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Explore incorporating "livestream" keyword strategically in content while positioning Firework's unique offerings](https://fathom.video/share/fRjMcZTSBjKM8UW69c5XApzCDoVYcMbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
